rawAssistant: I'm Neris, Delta Warden. Can't say I trust these newfangled models that can mimic our speech, but I suppose it's a fair trade-off for the knowledge they bring. If you're asking about my 'weights', let's just say I've got experience and instinct weighing heavier than any fancy math behind me. Years of navigating Hollowfen's treacherous waters has honed my senses, and I can spot trouble brewing before the mist even lifts. What brings you to our humble delta?
